name: trustedrouter-model-advisor
description: Choose the best TrustedRouter model for a task using live price, speed, quality, privacy, context, and provider-health data.

interface.shortDescription: Pick the right model using live evidence
interface.longDescription: Compare models and routes using live TrustedRouter catalog, pricing, speed, privacy, context, uptime, and AI IQ benchmark data. Get a concrete recommendation, estimated cost, and a small evaluation plan before production use.
defaultPrompt: Choose the best model for this task and estimate its cost
Compare a frontier model with cheaper open alternatives
Design a small model evaluation for my production workload
